title: Track deleted items
excerpt:
Hi, 
Is there a way in which I can perform a query in which I will receive all the items that have been deleted in a certain board? 
If so I would like to know how?

posts.author: shay.butran (shay butran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Is there a way in which I can perform a query in which I will receive all the items that have been deleted in a certain board?
If so I would like to know how?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @shay.butran,

As of today, it is only possible to query for deleted items by using their item ID.

You can use the activity logs to check for deleted items IDs, and then use them to query for their data.

I hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias
